activities.title: Santa's Cozy Cabin Meet & Greet
activities.description: A relaxed meet & greet with Santa in his cozy cabin, perfect for family photos and wish lists.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Wheelchair-accessible ramp and low photo bench available; flash can be reduced on request.

activities.title: Santa Storytime by the Fire
activities.description: Join Santa for a cozy storytime featuring classic Christmas tales by the indoor lodge fireplace.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Seating reserved for wheelchair users and low-sensory seating available near exits.

activities.title: Northern Lights Synchronized Show
activities.description: A choreographed light show set to orchestral holiday music in the main plaza.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Accessible viewing area with level ground and limited strobe effects.

activities.title: Winter Aurora Finale Light Show
activities.description: End your evening with our grand finale of sweeping lights and festive music.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Wheelchair risers located at the back of the lawn; assistive listening devices available on request.

activities.title: Elf Workshop: Ornament Decorating
activities.description: Create your own keepsake ornament with help from Santa's crafty elves. All supplies included.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Tables at wheelchair-friendly height; fragrance-free glues available.

activities.title: Family Snowflake Craft Lab
activities.description: Cut, paint, and glitter your own paper snowflakes in this family-friendly craft lab.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Quiet corner available for guests with sensory needs; reach tools provided.

activities.title: Carolers on the Green
activities.description: Traditional carols performed live by our costumed choir under the sparkling trees.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Paved paths and seating area available; moderate amplification used.

activities.title: Santa's Grand Arrival Parade
activities.description: Watch Santa arrive with his elves, toy soldiers, and marching band in this lively mini-parade.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Accessible curbside viewing along the North Gate side of the route.

activities.title: Gingerbread House Decorating Workshop
activities.description: Build and decorate your own gingerbread house with icing, candy, and expert tips.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Gluten-free gingerbread kits available by request; seating provided.

activities.title: Holiday Jazz Trio at the Lodge
activities.description: Smooth seasonal jazz standards performed live in the warmth of the lodge.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Table service available; low lighting, but pathways kept clear.

activities.title: Polar Express Mini Train Ride
activities.description: A short, family-friendly train ride around the illuminated village loop.
activities.accessibilityNotes: One accessible carriage available; boarding ramp at depot.

activities.title: Twinkle Tunnel Walkthrough
activities.description: Stroll through a tunnel of thousands of synchronized twinkling lights.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Smooth, paved path; mild pulsing lights, no rapid strobe.

activities.title: Kids' Cookie Decorating Party
activities.description: Children decorate sugar cookies with sprinkles and icing, supervised by our cookie elves.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Nut-free options available; high chairs available on request.

activities.title: Quiet Santa – Sensory-Friendly Visit
activities.description: A low-sensory Santa visit with dimmed lights, softer sounds, and extended time slots.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Sensory tools available; maximum of 4 families per session; wheelchair accessible.

activities.title: Sensory-Friendly Lights Preview
activities.description: A gentle preview of our light displays with reduced brightness and no loud music.
activities.accessibilityNotes: No strobe effects; low crowd capacity; seating available along the route.

activities.title: Elf & Reindeer Puppet Show
activities.description: A whimsical puppet show telling the story of Santa's busiest night.
activities.accessibilityNotes: Front-row floor seating for kids; space for wheelchairs at the sides.

entrances.name: North Gate – Accessible
entrances.description: Primary accessible entrance located nearest to the parking garage and bus stop.
entrances.directions: From the main parking garage, follow signs to the North Gate ramp entrance. Elevators are available from all parking levels.
entrances.notes: Wheelchair loans and accessibility assistance are coordinated from this gate.

entrances.name: South Gate – Main Plaza
entrances.description: Entrance opening directly into the Main Plaza near the central Christmas tree.
entrances.directions: Pedestrian access from City Center via Holiday Lane. Follow the lit archway to the South Gate turnstiles.
entrances.notes: Can be crowded during peak arrival times; consider North Gate for a quieter entrance.

entrances.name: East Gate – Rides Entrance
entrances.description: Entrance closest to the rides and mini train depot.
entrances.directions: From the overflow parking lot, follow the fenced path along the river to the East Gate.
entrances.notes: Stairs at this entrance; guests using mobility devices should use North or South Gates instead.

entrances.name: West Parking Entrance
entrances.description: Secondary entrance adjacent to the surface parking lot, with ramp access.
entrances.directions: From the West Lot, follow the illuminated pathway to the ticket booth and ramp at the West Entrance.
entrances.notes: Shortest walking distance for guests parking in the West Lot; limited staffing after 9:30 pm.

ticket_types.name: General Admission
ticket_types.description: Standard entry to the Christmas attraction for the selected evening, including access to all open walk-through areas, most shows, and general activities.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes entry for one guest on a single night, access to main light displays, live music, and general activity areas. Does not include reserved seating, photo packages, or complimentary food and drink.
perks: Access to general seating areas (first-come, first-served)
Access to outdoor live music and roaming entertainment

ticket_types.name: VIP Holiday Package
ticket_types.description: Upgrade your visit with VIP perks including priority entry, reserved viewing for the finale light show, and complimentary seasonal drinks.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes VIP entry for one guest on a single night, priority security and entry line, reserved viewing area for the Winter Aurora Finale Light Show, one complimentary holiday cocktail or hot cocoa, and a commemorative lanyard.
perks: Reserved finale light show viewing area
One complimentary holiday drink (cocktail or hot cocoa)

ticket_types.name: Family Night Ticket
ticket_types.description: Discounted admission designed for families, available on select midweek Family Night dates.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes admission for one person on designated Family Night evenings, access to all family zones, and participation in family-focused activities.
perks: Access to Family Night activities and games

ticket_types.name: Sensory-Friendly Morning Session
ticket_types.description: A specially designed low-sensory visit with reduced noise, softer lighting, and limited capacity, typically offered on select weekend mornings.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes admission to the attraction during a designated sensory-friendly morning time slot, with reduced crowd levels, quieter music, and modified light displays.

ticket_types.name: Group Evening Ticket (10+ Guests)
ticket_types.description: Discounted per-person evening admission for groups of 10 or more, ideal for clubs, teams, and extended families.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes general admission for one guest as part of an eligible group booking. Group receives a dedicated check-in point and one complimentary group photo download.

ticket_types.name: Season Pass
ticket_types.description: Unlimited visits to the attraction for the entire holiday season, subject to capacity limits.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes unlimited general admission for one guest throughout the current holiday season, plus 10% off select food, beverage, and merchandise.
perks: Unlimited general admission during operating season

ticket_types.name: Twilight Entry Ticket
ticket_types.description: Arrive earlier and enjoy the transition from dusk to full illumination with a twilight entry ticket.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes one-time entry from opening through 7:00 pm, access to all open attractions, and eligibility for same-day light shows.
perks: Access to main attractions before peak crowds

ticket_types.name: Late Night Ticket + Cocoa
ticket_types.description: Enjoy a quieter late-night visit and warm up with an included hot cocoa.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes admission after 8:30 pm on select nights and one complimentary hot cocoa redeemed at participating stands.

ticket_types.name: Santa Photo Bundle
ticket_types.description: Add-on bundle for professional photos with Santa, including digital downloads.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes a reserved photo session with Santa and a set of high-resolution digital image downloads, plus a small print package.

ticket_types.name: Kids' Craft Workshop Pass
ticket_types.description: Access pass for one child to participate in designated craft workshops throughout the evening.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes entry to up to three kids' craft workshops in a single night, all standard supplies included.
perks: Up to three craft workshop entries in one night

ticket_types.name: Date Night Duo Package
ticket_types.description: A package tailored for two adults, including admission, reserved seating at a live music set, and a shared dessert.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes admission for one adult (must be purchased twice for two guests), reserved seating at a live music performance, and a shared dessert platter for two.
perks: Reserved seating at one live music set

ticket_types.name: Weekday Value Pass
ticket_types.description: Discounted admission valid on select non-peak weekday nights.
ticket_types.whatsIncluded: Includes general admission for one guest on eligible weekday dates, with access to standard shows and activities.

transit_routes.name: Bus 42 – Downtown Holiday Loop
transit_routes.description: Frequent bus service connecting the downtown transit hub to the attraction's North Gate stop.
transit_routes.notes: North Gate stop is directly across from the accessible entrance; increased frequency on Friday and Saturday evenings.

transit_routes.name: Bus 15 – Crosstown
transit_routes.description: Crosstown route with a stop near the West Parking Entrance, about a 10–12 minute walk.
transit_routes.notes: Last evening trips may be crowded; check live tracker for delays.

transit_routes.name: Bus 7 – Park & Ride Shuttle
transit_routes.description: Shuttle from the regional Park & Ride lot to a stop near the East Gate.
transit_routes.notes: Operates only during the holiday season; not all trips are wheelchair accessible.

transit_routes.name: North Line Commuter Train
transit_routes.description: Regional commuter rail with a station approximately a 14-minute walk from the attraction.
transit_routes.notes: Limited late-night departures; check timetable for exact last train times.

transit_routes.name: Green Line – Festival Station
transit_routes.description: Subway service with a station at Festival Station, a short walk along a well-lit route.
transit_routes.notes: Elevators available at Festival Station; trains can be crowded immediately after closing time.

transit_routes.name: Riverfront Holiday Tram
transit_routes.description: Seasonal tram running along the riverfront with a stop near the South Gate.
transit_routes.notes: Open-air cars; dress warmly. Last departure leaves the attraction shortly after closing.

transit_routes.name: Winter Crossing Ferry
transit_routes.description: Scenic ferry route across the river with a dock within walking distance of the attraction.
transit_routes.notes: Operates weather permitting; check alerts for cancellations on windy evenings.

transit_routes.name: Bus 28 – Lakeshore
transit_routes.description: Weekend-only bus service running along Lakeshore Drive with a stop near the overflow parking.
transit_routes.notes: Stop is farther from the main entrances; allow extra time if traveling with young children.

accessible_viewing_areas.name: Main Plaza Light Show Viewing Deck
accessible_viewing_areas.description: Raised, gently sloped deck with level surfaces reserved for guests using wheelchairs, mobility devices, or who need step-free viewing of the plaza light shows.
accessible_viewing_areas.notes: Best spot for the Northern Lights Synchronized Show; arrive 1015 minutes early for guaranteed space.

accessible_viewing_areas.name: Riverfront Finale Accessible Zone
accessible_viewing_areas.description: Designated accessible viewing area along the riverfront lawn with unobstructed sightlines to the Winter Aurora Finale Light Show.
accessible_viewing_areas.notes: Portable chairs available on request; mild sound levels with option to borrow ear defenders from staff.

accessible_viewing_areas.name: North Gate Parade Curbside Area
accessible_viewing_areas.description: Level curbside zone along the parade route, reserved for wheelchair users and guests with limited mobility during Santa's Grand Arrival Parade.
accessible_viewing_areas.notes: Marked with blue pavement decals; companions should stand behind the marked line to preserve front-row access.

accessible_viewing_areas.name: Evergreen Lodge Music Corner
accessible_viewing_areas.description: Indoor corner near the Hearth Room stage with space for wheelchairs and a limited number of accessible-height seats for live music sets.
accessible_viewing_areas.notes: Recommended for guests who prefer a quieter environment; closest restrooms are also accessible.

cart_items.description: VIP Holiday Package  2 Adults (includes complimentary holiday drink)

sessions.name: Family Night  5:00 pm
sessions.notes: Standard Family Night with full sound and lighting; some shows include mild strobe effects.

sessions.name: Family Night  5:30 pm (Best Value)
sessions.notes: Best-value Family Night pricing; recommended for budget-conscious families.

sessions.name: Family Night  6:00 pm
sessions.notes: Arrive early to enjoy pre-show carolers in the Main Plaza.

sessions.name: Family Night  5:30 pm
sessions.notes: Includes access to the Winter Aurora Finale Light Show; may sell out early.

sessions.name: Family Night  5:00 pm (Weekend)
sessions.notes: Weekend Family Night with extended live music schedule and extra crowd control measures.

sessions.name: Sensory-Friendly Morning  Fri 9:00 am
sessions.notes: Reduced capacity with lower sound and dimmed, static lights; ideal for younger visitors.

sessions.name: Sensory-Friendly Morning  Sat 9:00 am
sessions.notes: First Saturday sensory-friendly time slot; lowest crowds and easiest parking.

sessions.name: Sensory-Friendly Morning  Sat 9:45 am
sessions.notes: Second Saturday sensory-friendly session; similar experience to 9:00 am with slightly higher attendance.

sessions.name: Sensory-Friendly Morning  Sat 9:00 am
sessions.notes: Includes optional quiet Santa meet-and-greet; very limited capacity.

sessions.name: Sensory-Friendly Morning  Sat 9:30 am
sessions.notes: Similar to other sensory-friendly sessions with slightly higher child pricing due to added activities.

sessions.name: Group Evening  Fri 8:15 pm
sessions.notes: Available exclusively for pre-booked groups of 10+; includes standard light shows and live music.

sessions.name: Group Evening  Fri 8:45 pm (Best Deal)
sessions.notes: Cheapest group price per person after 8:00 pm; ideal for large parties.

sessions.name: Group Evening  Fri 8:30 pm
sessions.notes: Includes extended hours and finale light show; slightly higher rate due to peak demand.

sessions.name: General Evening Session  6:00 pm
sessions.notes: Standard evening visit with access to all general admission areas and shows.

sessions.name: Late Night Session  8:30 pm + Cocoa
sessions.notes: Late-night entry with smaller crowds; includes complimentary cocoa at participating stands.

group_session_options.name: Group Evening – Fri Dec 11, 8:45 pm (Best Deal)
Early Evening Group – Thu Dec 17, 6:00 pm
Family Night Group Hold – Sun Dec 20, 5:00 pm

session_addons.name: Family Photo with Santa
session_addons.description: Reserved time slot for a professional family photo with Santa, including a digital download package.

session_addons.name: Cocoa & Cookie Bundle
session_addons.description: Four hot cocoas and four decorated cookies, ready for pickup at the Main Plaza cocoa stand.

session_addons.name: Prepaid Parking – Sensory Morning
session_addons.description: Discounted prepaid parking in the North Garage for the 9:00 am sensory-friendly session.

session_addons.name: Sensory Support Kit Rental
session_addons.description: Includes noise-reducing headphones, fidget tools, and a visual schedule card for the morning.

session_addons.name: Group Hot Cocoa Vouchers
session_addons.description: One small hot cocoa per guest, redeemable at any cocoa stand during your group visit.

session_addons.name: Holiday Cookie Platters
session_addons.description: Assorted holiday cookie platters sized for approximately 10 guests each.
